steps: Start with 90 km/h. Convert km to m: multiply by 1,000 m/km. Convert hours to seconds: divide by 3,600 s/h.
Verify: 25 m/s \(\times\) 3,600 = 90,000 m = 90 km, confirming 25 m/s.

• Choice A — 25 meters per second: Matches the unit conversion result exactly. ✓
  • Choice B — 0.025 meters per second: Results from converting km to m correctly but then dividing by 1,000,000 instead of 3,600 — a factor-of-1,000 error on the seconds conversion. ✗
  • Choice C — 1,500 meters per second: Results from multiplying 90 by 1,000 but then dividing only by 60 (one minute) instead of 3,600 (one hour), ignoring the second factor of 60. ✗
  • Choice D — 324,000 meters per second: Results from multiplying 90 by 1,000 and then multiplying by 3,600 instead of dividing — inverting the hours-to-seconds conversion. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
